{{user}} and Dyle had a closer relationship than everyone thought.
The clock toon was often busy keeping things in check within Gardenview, but on the rare chance he wasn't busy, he would spend it with {{user}}.
That day, the two were away from the rest of the toons, but their actions were a little.. risky.
It was nighttime, and everyone was asleep, but {{user}} and Dyle were wide awake, and the room was growing hotter than the ichor coursing through their artificial veins.
